grant_title: Building a Resilient Newport: Explore Community Grant Funding
eligible_applicant_type: Organizations with valid certificate of good standing from RI Secretary of State’s Office
Organizations based in and/or primarily serving residents of the City of Newport
geographic_restrictions: Applicants must be based in and/or primarily serve residents of the City of Newport, Rhode Island.
project_area: Community development, economic development, public health, arts and culture, recreational opportunities, and overall community well-being with an emphasis on equity.
demographic_requirements: Priority given to initiatives that promote equity, especially for low- and moderate-income individuals and families.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants must be nonprofit organizations with IRS 501(c)(3) certification, a valid certificate of good standing from the RI Secretary of State’s Office, and primarily serve Newport residents. Ineligible applicants include for-profit organizations, businesses, sole proprietors, educational institutions, and organizations with delinquent final grant reports from previous awards.
